---
title: "ViralQuantSim methodological demonstration"
format: html
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(viralquantsim)
```

## Simulate an assay

```{r}
parameters <- default_parameters()
parameters$n_samples <- 500
parameters$seed <- 42

simulated <- simulate_assay(parameters)
head(simulated[c(
  "sample_id",
  "true_log10_viral_load",
  "target_ct",
  "internal_control_ct",
  "delta_ct",
  "target_reads"
)])
```

## Compare estimators

```{r}
models <- fit_candidate_models(simulated)
comparison <- compare_models(models, simulated)
comparison
```

## Visualise a model

```{r}
plot_model_predictions(models$reads_delta_ct)
```
